summary: Comprehensive testing of Seva Setu Bot for Consulate General of India Johannesburg completed. Backend APIs working well with 81.2% success rate. Multi-language support verified in English, Hindi, Afrikaans, Zulu. Real-time scraping system operational with fallback mechanism. Logging and exception handling working correctly.

minor_issues.issue: Image format validation too strict - rejects base64 test data
minor_issues.impact: Document scanning fails with test images

minor_issues.issue: SSL certificate verification fails for cgijoburg.gov.in and VFS Global
minor_issues.impact: Falls back to cached data, VFS timings not live

integration_issues.issue: Browser launch failed due to memory/system constraints
integration_issues.impact: Could not verify UI elements directly

verified_features: Bot name correctly displays as 'Seva Setu Bot'
VFS timings Mon-Fri 08:00-15:00 available in knowledge base

passed_tests: Seva Setu Bot chat in English, Hindi, Afrikaans, Zulu
Passport, Visa, OCI information from official sources
Knowledge change detection with MD5 hashing

action_item_for_main_agent.ssl_certificates: Fix SSL certificate verification for real-time scraping from cgijoburg.gov.in and VFS Global websites
action_item_for_main_agent.document_scanning: Update document scan endpoint to handle test images properly - current validation is too strict
action_item_for_main_agent.avatar_verification: Verify avatar image shows Namaste praying hands symbol (not person photo) - browser testing failed due to system constraints
action_item_for_main_agent.frontend_testing: Complete frontend UI testing for progress stepper, voice/camera buttons functionality

success_percentage.frontend: Partial - API integration verified, UI elements need manual verification
